title: Black Arrows triumphant on Human Rights Day
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The final of the Human...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The final of the Human Rights Soccer Tournament at uMasizakhe Stadium on Sunday afternoon, 23 March, saw Black Arrows beating Keegan Cosmos 3-0 to take home the title.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - The final of the Human Rights Soccer Tournament at uMasizakhe Stadium on Sunday afternoon, 23 March, saw Black Arrows beating Keegan Cosmos 3-0 to take home the title."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The tournament, jointly organised by the local football association and the referees committee, was held to celebrate Human Rights Day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sixteen teams participated in the 'money tournament' from Friday to Sunday.","html":"Sixteen teams participated in the 'money tournament' from Friday to Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This term is used when clubs collect money themselves through 'money games', where teams raise money through fun events and put in into a pool to be used as prize money due to the absence of sponsors.","html":"This term is used when clubs collect money themselves through 'money games', where teams raise money through fun events and put in into a pool to be used as prize money due to the absence of sponsors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Clubs that could not contribute financially nevertheless played games in their own areas for entertainment on Human Rights Day.","html":"Clubs that could not contribute financially nevertheless played games in their own areas for entertainment on Human Rights Day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Due to lack of funds, the committed referees went hungry for most of the final day, refereeing games back to back without receiving anything to eat.","html":"Due to lack of funds, the committed referees went hungry for most of the final day, refereeing games back to back without receiving anything to eat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They eventually received food before the final game.","html":"They eventually received food before the final game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The organiser of the tournament, Thembela Futshane, appealed to potential sponsors to help keep the communities entertained by sponsoring events such as this.","html":"The organiser of the tournament, Thembela Futshane, appealed to potential sponsors to help keep the communities entertained by sponsoring events such as this."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Black Arrows triumphant on Human Rights Day
